productName: Rays - 7.5oz Hash Rosin Kiwi Strawberry Lemonade - 100mg THC : 20mg CBD : 20mg CBG : 20mg CBN : 20mg CBC - DOH
description: A crisp sweet-tart lemonade drink that tastes like it was mixed at a tiny craft soda bar — flavorful, refreshing, and infused for a smooth edible-style ride. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect. Best enjoyed cold, with plenty of time for the infused finish to arrive.
